---
title: "Your Next Application"
---

:::{.column-page-inset-right}

{{< revealjs file="/slides/05-complex_app.html" height="500px" class="ratio ratio-16x9" >}}

:::

# Slide Contents

{{< include /slides/05-complex_app.qmd >}}

# Code

:::{.column-page-inset}

`code/demos/app-05-tips.py`

```{shinylive-python}
#| standalone: true
#| components: [editor, viewer]
#| layout: vertical
#| viewerHeight: 550

{{< include /../code/demos/app-05-tips.py >}}

## file: requirements.txt
ridgeplot
```

`code/demos/app-05a-tips-layout.py`

```{shinylive-python}
#| standalone: true
#| components: [editor, viewer]

{{< include /../code/demos/app-05a-tips-layout.py >}}
```

:::
